recipes.name: BBQ Chicken & Rice Bowl
ingredients: Salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Preheat oven to 400F (205C). Line a baking sheet with foil.
Season chicken with garlic powder, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Toss broccoli with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on baking sheet.
Place chicken on the same baking sheet. Bake 20-22 min until internal temp hits 165F.
Brush chicken with BBQ sauce in the last 5 min of baking.
Rest chicken 5 min then slice or shred.
Portion into 4 containers with rice and broccoli.

recipes.name: Ground Turkey Taco Bowls
ingredients: 1 can (15oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Cook white rice per package. Saute cauliflower rice 4-5 min until golden. Mix both together.
Heat 1 tsp oil in a large skillet, saute onion and peppers 5-7 min. Remove and set aside.
Add remaining oil, cook ground turkey 8 min breaking it apart until browned.
Add taco seasoning and a splash of water. Stir and cook 2 more min.
Assemble in 5 containers: rice blend, corn, black beans, turkey mix, peppers, and salsa.
Add fresh avocado when serving.

recipes.name: Protein Overnight Oats
ingredients: 1 scoop (30g) vanilla casein or whey protein powder
instructions: Add oats, chia seeds, protein powder, and Greek yogurt to a mason jar.
Pour in milk and stir until protein powder is fully dissolved.
Add honey and mix again.
Seal and refrigerate overnight or at least 6 hours.
In the morning top with banana or berries and peanut butter.
Eat cold or microwave 60-90 seconds.
recipes.storage: Fridge up to 4 days without toppings

recipes.name: Buffalo Chicken Breakfast Casserole
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F (190C). Spray a 9x13 baking dish.
Whisk eggs with buffalo sauce, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Fold in chicken, carrots, celery, and green onions.
Pour into baking dish evenly.
Bake 32-35 min until center is set and top is lightly golden.
Cool 10 min then slice into 6 portions.

recipes.name: Salmon & Sweet Potato Bowl
ingredients: 2 tsp dried dill or Italian seasoning
instructions: Preheat oven to 425F (220C). Toss sweet potato cubes with 1.5 tbsp oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast sweet potatoes 20 min flipping halfway through.
Pat salmon dry. Rub with remaining oil, garlic, dill, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Push potatoes aside, add salmon skin-side down. Roast together 12-15 min.
Saute spinach in a pan with a bit of oil until wilted about 2 min.
Build bowls: spinach base, sweet potatoes, salmon on top, cherry tomatoes on the side.

recipes.name: One-Pot White Chicken Chili
instructions: Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Saute onion 4 min, add garlic 1 min.
Add whole chicken breasts, broth, green chiles, cumin, chili powder, and oregano.
Bring to boil, reduce to simmer, cover and cook 20-25 min.
Remove chicken and shred with two forks. Return to pot.
Add white beans and corn. Simmer uncovered 5-8 min.
Cube cream cheese and stir in until fully melted.
Adjust seasoning. Divide into 6 containers.

recipes.name: Pineapple Glazed Chicken Bowl
ingredients: 2 lbs (900g) chicken breast, cut into chunks
1 can (20oz) pineapple chunks in juice, juice reserved
instructions: Cook brown rice per package instructions.
Whisk pineapple juice, soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, garlic, ginger, and cornstarch to make glaze.
Heat oil in a wok over high heat. Sear chicken 6-8 min until golden.
Add broccoli or snap peas. Stir-fry 3-4 min until bright green.
Add pineapple chunks and pour glaze over everything. Toss and cook 2-3 min until thickened.
Serve over brown rice, garnish with sesame seeds.
Portion into 4 containers.

recipes.name: Greek Chicken & Quinoa Bowl
instructions: Marinate chicken: mix olive oil, lemon juice, zest, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper. Coat chicken and marinate at least 30 min.
Rinse quinoa, cook in 3 cups water, simmer covered 15 min. Fluff with fork.
Cook chicken in skillet over medium-high 6-7 min per side until 165F. Rest 5 min then slice.
Toss cucumber, tomatoes, red onion, and olives with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Assemble: quinoa base, sliced chicken, cucumber salad, feta on top.
Add tzatziki if desired: mix Greek yogurt with lemon, dill, and garlic.
recipes.storage: Fridge 4 days, add salad fresh day-of for best texture

recipes.name: Beef & Veggie Stir Fry
ingredients: 1.5 lbs (680g) lean beef sirloin or flank steak, sliced thin against the grain
instructions: Cook rice per package instructions.
Toss sliced beef with cornstarch, 1 tbsp soy sauce, and pepper. Rest 10 min.
Mix remaining soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, and 2 tbsp water to make sauce.
Heat wok over high until smoking. Add 1 tbsp oil, sear beef in batches 1-2 min per side. Remove.
Add remaining oil. Stir fry carrots and peppers 2 min. Add broccoli and snap peas 3-4 min.
Add garlic and ginger 30 sec. Return beef to wok.
Pour sauce over everything. Toss on high heat 1-2 min until coated.
Serve over rice in 4 containers.

recipes.name: High-Protein Chocolate Pudding
ingredients: 2-3 tbsp milk or almond milk for consistency
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender or use an immersion blender.
Blend until completely smooth about 60 sec, scraping sides as needed.
Taste and adjust sweetness or cocoa intensity.
Add milk one tbsp at a time to reach desired pudding thickness.
Pour into 2 containers.
Refrigerate at least 30 min to set. Top with berries or dark chocolate chips if desired.

recipes.name: Egg White & Veggie Frittata
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F (190C).
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe 10-inch skillet over medium heat.
Saute red onion and bell pepper 3-4 min. Add spinach and cook until wilted 1-2 min.
Add cherry tomatoes and stir briefly.
Whisk egg whites and whole eggs with Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Pour egg mixture over vegetables. Do not stir.
Sprinkle feta cheese on top.
Cook on stovetop 2-3 min until edges begin to set.
Transfer to oven and bake 15-18 min until center is firm.
Cool and slice into 4 wedges.

recipes.name: Turkey Meatballs & Zucchini Noodles
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F (205C). Line a baking sheet with parchment.
Mix ground turkey, breadcrumbs, Parmesan, egg, garlic, Italian seasoning, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
Roll into 20-24 equal meatballs and place on baking sheet.
Bake 18-20 min until cooked through and lightly browned.
Warm marinara sauce in a large pan over medium heat.
Add cooked meatballs to sauce and simmer 5 min.
Heat olive oil in a separate pan, saute zucchini noodles 2-3 min until just tender.
Serve meatballs and sauce over zucchini noodles.
recipes.storage: Fridge 4 days / Freeze meatballs separately 3 months

recipes.name: Shrimp & Broccoli Stir Fry
ingredients: 1.5 lbs (680g) large shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 tbsp cornstarch mixed with 2 tbsp water
instructions: Mix soy sauce, oyster sauce, honey, sesame oil, and cornstarch mixture to make sauce.
Heat 1 tbsp oil in a wok over high heat. Cook shrimp 1-2 min per side until pink. Remove.
Add remaining oil. Stir fry broccoli 3-4 min until bright green and slightly tender.
Add garlic and ginger 30 sec.
Return shrimp to wok. Pour sauce over everything. Toss 1-2 min until coated.
Serve over rice. Add chili flakes if desired.

recipes.name: Stuffed Bell Peppers with Ground Beef
ingredients: 4 large bell peppers, tops cut off and seeds removed
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F (190C).
Heat olive oil in a skillet. Cook onion 3 min, add garlic 1 min.
Add ground beef, cook until browned, about 7-8 min. Drain excess fat.
Stir in diced tomatoes, cooked rice, Italian seasoning, cumin, salt, and pepper. Cook 2 min.
Place hollowed peppers in a baking dish. Fill each with the beef-rice mixture.
Top each pepper with shredded cheese.
Cover with foil and bake 30 min. Uncover and bake 10 more min until peppers are tender and cheese is bubbly.

recipes.name: Chicken Tikka Masala (Lightened)
ingredients: 2 lbs (900g) boneless skinless chicken breast, cubed
2 cups cooked basmati rice for serving
instructions: Marinate chicken in Greek yogurt, half the tikka masala, salt, and 1 garlic clove. Refrigerate 30 min minimum.
Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high. Cook marinated chicken in batches until golden. Remove.
In the same pan saute onion 5 min, add garlic, ginger, remaining tikka masala, garam masala, and cumin. Cook 2 min.
Add crushed tomatoes. Simmer 10 min.
Stir in coconut milk. Add chicken back to the pan.
Simmer together 10-15 min until sauce thickens.
Serve over basmati rice, garnish with cilantro.

recipes.name: Ground Turkey Sweet Potato Skillet
ingredients: 2 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and diced small
2 cups kale or spinach, roughly chopped
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add sweet potatoes and cook 10-12 min until tender. Remove.
Add remaining oil, cook onion and peppers until softened about 5 min.
Add ground turkey. Break apart and cook fully through about 8 min.
Season with cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Return sweet potatoes to pan. Add kale and stir until wilted about 2 min.
Top with shredded cheese, cover 1 min to melt.
Divide into 4 meal prep containers.

recipes.name: Cajun Chicken Pasta
ingredients: 1/2 cup light cream or Greek yogurt
instructions: Cook pasta al dente per package. Reserve 1/2 cup pasta water. Drain.
Coat chicken with Cajun seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken 4-5 min per side until cooked through. Remove and slice.
In the same pan saute garlic 1 min. Add cherry tomatoes, cook 2 min.
Add broth and scrape up any bits. Stir in cream or yogurt.
Add pasta, spinach, and chicken. Toss to coat, adding pasta water as needed.
Top with Parmesan. Divide into 4 containers.

recipes.name: Teriyaki Chicken Bowl
ingredients: 1 tsp cornstarch dissolved in 1 tbsp water
Sesame seeds and green onion for garnish
instructions: Cook rice per package instructions.
Make teriyaki sauce: combine soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, and cornstarch mixture.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken thighs 5-6 min per side until 165F.
Pour teriyaki sauce over chicken. Simmer 2-3 min until sauce thickens and glazes chicken.
Remove chicken and slice. Steam or saute broccoli and carrots until tender-crisp.
Assemble bowls: rice, veggies, chicken. Drizzle with extra sauce. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onion.

recipes.name: Turkey & Veggie Omelette
ingredients: 3oz cooked ground turkey or diced turkey breast
instructions: Whisk eggs and egg whites with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium. Saute onion and pepper 2 min.
Add spinach and turkey, cook 1 min more. Remove and set aside.
Wipe pan clean, add a bit more oil.
Pour in egg mixture. Cook undisturbed until edges begin to set about 2-3 min.
Add filling to one half. Sprinkle cheese on top.
Fold omelette in half and cook 1 more min.
Slide onto plate. Add hot sauce if desired.

recipes.name: Protein French Toast
ingredients: 4 slices thick whole-grain or brioche bread
Fresh berries and maple syrup for topping
instructions: Whisk eggs, Greek yogurt, milk, protein powder, cinnamon, and vanilla until smooth.
Soak bread slices in egg mixture 30-60 sec per side.
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over medium.
Cook soaked bread 2-3 min per side until golden brown.
Serve topped with fresh berries and a drizzle of maple syrup.

recipes.name: Chicken Burrito Bowl
ingredients: 2 cups cilantro-lime rice (cook rice with lime juice and fresh cilantro)
1 can (15oz) pinto or black beans, drained
1 cup pico de gallo or salsa
instructions: Season chicken with fajita seasoning. Heat oil in a skillet and cook chicken 6-7 min per side until 165F. Rest and slice.
Cook rice per package instructions. Stir in lime juice and fresh cilantro when done.
Heat beans with a pinch of cumin and salt.
Assemble in 5 containers: rice, beans, corn, chicken, pico, lettuce, cheese.
Add avocado fresh when serving.

recipes.name: Tuna Stuffed Avocado
ingredients: 2 cans (5oz each) albacore tuna in water, drained
2 tbsp plain Greek yogurt or light mayo
instructions: Mix tuna with Greek yogurt, lemon juice, celery, red onion, mustard, salt, and pepper.
Scoop a little extra avocado from the center of each half to make room.
Dice the scooped avocado and fold into the tuna mixture.
Fill each avocado half generously with tuna salad.
Dust with paprika and serve.
recipes.storage: Best eaten fresh, tuna salad lasts 3 days

recipes.name: Shrimp Fried Rice
ingredients: 1 lb (450g) large shrimp, peeled and deveined
3 cups cooked and cooled jasmine rice (day-old works best)
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp oil in a wok over high heat. Cook shrimp 1-2 min per side. Remove.
Add remaining oil. Add garlic and frozen peas and carrots, stir fry 2 min.
Push veggies to the side. Scramble eggs in the empty space until just set.
Add rice, breaking up any clumps. Stir fry everything together 3-4 min.
Add shrimp back. Pour soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil over everything.
Toss on high heat 1-2 min. Garnish with green onions.

recipes.name: Chicken Souvlaki Plate
ingredients: 2 lbs (900g) chicken breast, cut into 1.5-inch cubes
2 cups cooked brown rice or pita
Tzatziki: 1 cup Greek yogurt + 1/2 cucumber grated + dill + lemon
instructions: Marinate chicken: mix olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, pepper. Marinate at least 1 hour.
Thread chicken onto skewers. Grill or broil 10-12 min turning occasionally until cooked through.
Make tzatziki by mixing all tzatziki ingredients. Refrigerate.
Assemble plates: rice or pita base, chicken, cucumber-tomato salad, red onion, feta, and a generous dollop of tzatziki.

recipes.name: Korean Ground Beef Bowl
ingredients: 2 cups steamed broccoli or bok choy
instructions: Cook rice per package instructions.
Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, honey, rice vinegar, and red pepper flakes into a sauce.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high. Add garlic and ginger, cook 1 min.
Add ground beef. Cook until browned, about 8 min, breaking it apart.
Pour sauce over beef. Stir and cook 2 min until absorbed.
Serve over rice with steamed broccoli. Top with green onions and sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Salmon Poke Bowl
ingredients: Sesame seeds and green onions for garnish
instructions: Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and sriracha. Toss salmon cubes in this marinade. Rest 15 min.
Divide sushi rice into 2 bowls.
Arrange marinated salmon, edamame, cucumber, avocado, and carrots over rice.
Drizzle extra marinade or soy sauce on top.
Garnish with sesame seeds, green onion, and seaweed strips.
recipes.storage: Best eaten same day. Store components separately if prepping ahead.

recipes.name: Turkey & Hummus Wrap
instructions: Lay tortillas flat. Spread 2 tbsp hummus on each.
Layer turkey, spinach, cucumber, carrots, roasted red pepper, and feta.
Drizzle lemon juice over filling. Season with salt and pepper.
Roll tightly, tucking in the sides as you go.
Cut in half diagonally and wrap in foil or parchment for storage.

recipes.name: Baked Lemon Garlic Salmon
ingredients: 1 tbsp fresh dill or 1 tsp dried dill
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F (205C). Line a baking dish with foil.
Mix olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, dill, parsley, and red pepper flakes.
Place salmon fillets in baking dish. Pour garlic-lemon mixture over each.
Layer lemon slices on top of each fillet.
Bake 12-15 min until salmon flakes easily with a fork.
Serve with roasted veggies or a salad.

recipes.name: Honey Garlic Chicken Thighs
ingredients: Fresh thyme or parsley for garnish
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F (205C).
Season chicken with paprika, salt, and pepper.
Heat oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high. Sear chicken skin-side down 4-5 min until golden.
Flip chicken. Mix honey, garlic, soy sauce, vinegar, and red pepper flakes.
Pour sauce over chicken. Transfer skillet to oven.
Bake 20-25 min until internal temp reaches 165F and sauce is caramelized.
Garnish with fresh herbs. Serve with roasted veggies or rice.

recipes.name: Ground Turkey Chili
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Saute onion and bell pepper 5 min.
Add garlic, cook 1 min. Add ground turkey, cook until browned about 8 min.
Add all spices, stir and cook 1 min.
Add crushed tomatoes, diced tomatoes, kidney beans, and black beans.
Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer uncovered 25-30 min until thickened.
Adjust seasoning. Serve with optional toppings: shredded cheese, sour cream, green onion.

recipes.name: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl
ingredients: 1 tsp cornstarch dissolved in 1 tbsp water
Sesame seeds and green onions for topping
instructions: Cook rice per package. Steam or saute broccoli until tender-crisp.
Make teriyaki sauce: combine soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, sesame oil, garlic, and cornstarch mixture in a small pan. Heat until thickened, about 2 min.
Brush salmon with a bit of sauce. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high.
Cook salmon 3-4 min per side until cooked through.
Assemble bowls: rice, broccoli, salmon. Spoon extra sauce over salmon.
Top with sesame seeds and green onions.

recipes.name: Chicken Fajita Bowl
ingredients: 2 lbs (900g) chicken breast, sliced into strips
1 can (15oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
Salsa and Greek yogurt (instead of sour cream) for topping
instructions: Toss chicken strips with fajita seasoning and 1 tbsp oil.
Heat remaining oil in a large skillet over high heat. Cook chicken 5-6 min until cooked. Remove.
In the same pan, cook peppers and onions over high 4-5 min until charred and tender.
Squeeze lime juice over the peppers.
Assemble bowls: cilantro-lime rice, black beans, chicken, fajita veggies.
Top with salsa, fresh cilantro, and a dollop of Greek yogurt.

recipes.name: Lemon Herb Baked Tilapia
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F (205C). Line a baking sheet with parchment.
Mix olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, thyme, oregano, and paprika.
Place tilapia on baking sheet. Brush generously with herb mixture.
Layer lemon slices on top of each fillet.
Bake 12-15 min until fish flakes easily.
Garnish with fresh parsley. Serve with roasted vegetables or quinoa.

recipes.name: Thai Peanut Chicken
ingredients: 2 lbs (900g) chicken breast, cut into strips
Crushed peanuts and green onions for garnish
instructions: Cook rice per package.
Make peanut sauce: whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, honey, rice vinegar, lime juice, sriracha, garlic, and ginger. Add 2-3 tbsp water to thin.
Heat oil in a wok over high. Cook chicken strips 5-6 min until golden. Remove.
Stir fry snap peas and peppers 3-4 min.
Return chicken to wok. Pour peanut sauce over everything. Toss to coat.
Serve over rice. Garnish with crushed peanuts and green onion.

recipes.name: Pork Tenderloin with Roasted Veggies
instructions: Preheat oven to 425F (220C).
Toss potatoes with 1 tbsp oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet. Roast 15 min.
Rub pork with remaining oil, mustard, garlic, rosemary, thyme, salt, and pepper.
Add pork to the baking sheet along with zucchini, tomatoes, and red onion.
Roast together 20-25 min until pork internal temp reaches 145F.
Rest pork 5 min before slicing. Serve with roasted vegetables.

recipes.name: Baked Chicken Meatballs
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F (205C). Line a baking sheet with parchment.
Combine ground chicken, breadcrumbs, egg, Parmesan, garlic, parsley, Italian seasoning, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
Mix until just combined. Do not overmix.
Roll into 25-30 equal balls and place on baking sheet.
Bake 18-20 min until cooked through and lightly golden.
Serve with marinara, over pasta, rice, or in a sub.

recipes.name: Sesame Ginger Salmon
ingredients: Sesame seeds and sliced green onions for garnish
Steamed bok choy or broccoli for serving
instructions: Whisk soy sauce, sesame oil, honey, rice vinegar, garlic, and ginger into a marinade.
Place salmon in a shallow dish and pour marinade over it. Marinate 20-30 min.
Heat avocado oil in a skillet over medium-high. Remove salmon from marinade (reserve it).
Cook salmon 3-4 min per side until cooked through.
Pour reserved marinade into pan after flipping, cook 1-2 min to reduce slightly.
Serve over steamed greens. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.

recipes.name: Beef Egg Roll in a Bowl
ingredients: 1 bag (14oz) coleslaw mix (shredded cabbage and carrots)
1 tsp sriracha or chili garlic sauce
2 cups cooked rice or cauliflower rice
instructions: Heat avocado oil in a large wok or skillet over medium-high.
Add ground beef and cook until browned about 8 min. Drain excess fat.
Add garlic and ginger, cook 1 min.
Add coleslaw mix. Toss and cook 3-4 min until cabbage wilts slightly.
Pour in soy sauce, sesame oil, rice vinegar, and sriracha. Toss everything to coat.
Cook 2 more min. Garnish with green onions.
Serve over rice or cauliflower rice.

recipes.name: Chipotle Lime Shrimp Bowl
ingredients: 1.5 lbs (680g) large shrimp, peeled and deveined
2 tbsp adobo sauce from canned chipotles
Fresh cilantro and lime wedges for serving
instructions: Toss shrimp with adobo sauce, lime juice, cumin, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high. Cook shrimp 1-2 min per side until pink and curled. Do not overcook.
Assemble bowls: rice, black beans, corn, shrimp, pico de gallo.
Garnish with cilantro and lime wedges.

recipes.name: Turkey Stuffed Zucchini Boats
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F (205C). Scoop out center of zucchini halves, chop the flesh and reserve.
Brush zucchini boats with olive oil, season with salt. Place cut-side up on a baking sheet. Bake 10 min.
In a skillet, heat oil, saute onion 3 min, add garlic 1 min.
Add turkey, cook until browned. Add chopped zucchini flesh and diced tomatoes.
Season with Italian seasoning, paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook 5 min.
Fill zucchini boats with turkey mixture. Top with mozzarella and Parmesan.
Bake 15 min until cheese is melted and bubbly.

recipes.name: Chicken & Lentil Soup
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium. Saute onion, carrot, and celery 5 min.
Add garlic, cumin, coriander, and turmeric. Cook 2 min.
Add lentils, chicken breasts (whole), diced tomatoes, and broth.
Bring to boil, reduce heat, cover and simmer 25 min until chicken is cooked and lentils are tender.
Remove chicken and shred. Return to pot.
Stir in baby spinach and cook 2 min until wilted.
Finish with a squeeze of lemon. Adjust seasoning.

recipes.name: Garlic Butter Shrimp & Asparagus
ingredients: 1.5 lbs (680g) large shrimp, peeled and deveined
instructions: Season shrimp with salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes.
Melt 2 tbsp butter in a large skillet over medium-high. Cook asparagus 3-4 min until tender-crisp. Remove.
Add remaining butter. Cook garlic 1 min until fragrant.
Add shrimp in a single layer. Cook 1-2 min per side until pink.
Add broth and lemon juice. Stir and cook 1 min.
Return asparagus to pan. Toss everything together.
Garnish with parsley. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Buffalo Chicken Rice Bowl
ingredients: 3 tbsp plain Greek yogurt (as ranch substitute)
instructions: Cook rice per package. Steam or roast broccoli.
Cook chicken in a skillet or bake at 400F until 165F. Shred.
Toss shredded chicken with buffalo sauce and melted butter.
Make a quick Greek yogurt ranch: mix yogurt, lemon, garlic powder, dill, salt.
Assemble bowls: rice, broccoli, carrots, buffalo chicken on top.
Drizzle with Greek yogurt ranch.

recipes.name: Baked Cod with Asparagus
instructions: Preheat oven to 400F (205C). Line a baking sheet with foil.
Toss asparagus with 1.5 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper. Spread on baking sheet.
Pat cod dry. Mix remaining oil, garlic, lemon juice, zest, paprika, and garlic powder.
Place cod on top of asparagus. Brush generously with lemon-garlic mixture.
Bake 14-16 min until cod flakes easily and asparagus is tender.
Garnish with fresh parsley and dill.

recipes.name: Protein Pancakes
ingredients: 1 cup rolled oats, blended into flour
Butter or cooking spray for pan
Fresh berries and maple syrup to serve
instructions: Blend oats into a fine flour.
Mix oat flour, protein powder, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
Whisk together Greek yogurt, eggs, milk, and vanilla in a separate bowl.
Combine wet and dry ingredients. Stir until a smooth batter forms. Let rest 2 min.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium. Add a bit of butter or spray.
Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake. Cook 2-3 min until bubbles form on top, then flip and cook 1-2 min.
Serve with fresh berries and a small drizzle of maple syrup.

recipes.name: Spinach & Feta Egg Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F (190C). Spray a 12-cup muffin tin generously.
Whisk eggs and egg whites with garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
Divide spinach, feta, bell pepper, onion, and sun-dried tomatoes evenly across muffin cups.
Pour egg mixture over the fillings in each cup, filling about 3/4 full.
Bake 20-22 min until eggs are fully set and lightly golden on top.
Cool 5 min before removing. Use a butter knife to loosen edges.

recipes.name: Chicken Apple Sausage Patties
ingredients: 1 small apple, peeled and finely grated
instructions: Combine ground chicken, grated apple, onion, sage, garlic powder, fennel seeds, cinnamon, red pepper flakes, salt, and pepper.
Mix well and form into 8 equal patties.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Cook patties 3-4 min per side until cooked through and golden.
Serve with eggs or add to a breakfast bowl.

recipes.name: Freezer Breakfast Sandwiches
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F (175C). Spray a 9x13 baking dish.
Whisk eggs with milk, salt, and pepper. Pour into baking dish.
Bake 20-22 min until fully set. Cut into 6 equal portions.
Toast English muffins.
Layer each muffin with egg portion, cheese slice, and chicken sausage patty.
Wrap tightly in foil. Refrigerate up to 5 days or freeze up to 2 months.
To reheat from frozen: remove foil, wrap in paper towel, microwave 2-3 min.

recipes.name: Smoked Salmon Breakfast Bowl
ingredients: 2 medium potatoes or sweet potatoes, diced and roasted
4 large eggs, poached or hard boiled
instructions: Roast diced potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper at 425F for 20-25 min.
Prepare eggs to preference (poached or hard boiled).
Arrange greens in 2 bowls. Top with roasted potatoes, smoked salmon, eggs, and avocado.
Scatter capers and red onion over the bowls.
Drizzle with lemon juice. Sprinkle everything bagel seasoning.
recipes.storage: Prep components separately, store up to 3 days

recipes.name: Cottage Cheese Scrambled Eggs
ingredients: 1 tbsp chives or green onion, chopped
Optional: hot sauce, everything bagel seasoning
instructions: Whisk eggs and cottage cheese together until combined. Season with salt and pepper.
Heat butter in a non-stick pan over low-medium heat.
Pour in egg-cottage cheese mixture.
Slowly fold eggs from the outside toward the center using a spatula. Cook low and slow 3-5 min.
Remove from heat while still slightly wet. Residual heat will finish cooking.
Top with chives and optional hot sauce.

recipes.name: Ground Beef & Rice Bowl
ingredients: Green onions and sesame seeds for topping
instructions: Cook rice per package instructions.
Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high. Add ground beef, cook until browned about 8 min.
Add garlic, cook 1 min. Season with soy sauce, Worcestershire, garlic powder, onion powder, and pepper.
Stir and cook 2 more min until fully seasoned.
Serve over rice with steamed broccoli. Top with green onions and sesame seeds.

recipes.name: Asian Chicken Salad
ingredients: 2 lbs (900g) cooked and shredded chicken breast
Dressing: 3 tbsp soy sauce, 2 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tbsp sesame oil, 1 tbsp honey, 1 tsp ginger, 1 tsp garlic
instructions: Whisk together all dressing ingredients until combined.
In a large bowl combine coleslaw mix, purple cabbage, carrots, and green onions.
Add shredded chicken and toss with dressing.
Top with sliced almonds and sesame seeds just before serving to keep crunch.
Divide into 4 containers. Store dressing separately if prepping ahead.

recipes.name: Pulled Chicken Sweet Potatoes
ingredients: Toppings: 3 tbsp Greek yogurt, 2 tbsp green onions, shredded cheese
instructions: Bake or microwave sweet potatoes until soft throughout.
Season chicken with paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper. Bake at 400F 20-22 min.
Shred chicken with two forks. Toss with BBQ sauce.
Cut each sweet potato open. Fluff with a fork.
Load each potato with pulled chicken, a dollop of Greek yogurt, green onions, and cheese.

recipes.name: Shrimp Taco Bowl
ingredients: 1.5 lbs (680g) large shrimp, peeled and deveined
1 cup mango salsa or pico de gallo
instructions: Toss shrimp with taco seasoning. Heat oil in a skillet, cook shrimp 1-2 min per side until pink.
Assemble bowls: cilantro-lime rice, shredded cabbage, shrimp, mango salsa, diced avocado.
Squeeze lime juice over top. Garnish with fresh cilantro.

recipes.name: Chicken Shawarma Bowl
ingredients: 2 cups cooked basmati rice or quinoa
Marinade: 3 tbsp olive oil, 3 garlic cloves minced, 2 tsp cumin, 2 tsp paprika, 1 tsp turmeric, 1 tsp cinnamon, 1/2 tsp cayenne, salt, lemon juice
Tahini sauce: 3 tbsp tahini, 2 tbsp lemon juice, 1 tbsp water, 1 garlic clove, salt
instructions: Combine marinade ingredients. Coat chicken and refrigerate at least 2 hours or overnight.
Cook chicken in a hot skillet over medium-high 6-7 min per side until 165F. Rest then slice thin.
Make tahini sauce by blending all sauce ingredients until smooth.
Assemble bowls: rice or quinoa, cucumber, tomatoes, red onion, parsley, and chicken.
Drizzle with tahini sauce.

recipes.name: Egg Salad Lettuce Cups
ingredients: Romaine or butter lettuce leaves for serving
instructions: Peel and chop hard-boiled eggs. Set aside.
Mix Greek yogurt, mustard, red onion, celery, dill, and lemon juice.
Fold in chopped eggs gently. Season with salt and pepper.
Spoon egg salad into lettuce cups.
Dust with paprika before serving.
recipes.storage: Egg salad fridge 4 days. Fill cups just before eating.

recipes.name: Turkey Lettuce Wraps
ingredients: 8-10 large butter or romaine lettuce leaves
1 cup water chestnuts, drained and diced
Green onions and sesame seeds for garnish
instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high. Cook turkey until browned about 8 min.
Add garlic and ginger, cook 1 min.
Add water chestnuts and carrots, stir 2 min.
Pour in hoisin sauce, soy sauce, sesame oil, and rice vinegar. Stir to coat.
Cook 2-3 min until sauce is absorbed.
Spoon turkey mixture into lettuce leaves. Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.
recipes.storage: Turkey filling fridge 4 days. Fill leaves fresh.

recipes.name: Tuna Pasta Salad
ingredients: 3 cans (5oz each) albacore tuna in water, drained
8oz whole wheat rotini or penne, cooked and cooled
instructions: Cook pasta al dente, rinse with cold water, drain well.
Mix Greek yogurt, mayo, mustard, lemon juice, and dill to make dressing.
In a large bowl combine pasta, tuna, celery, red onion, peas, and bell pepper.
Pour dressing over salad and toss well.
Season with salt and pepper. Divide into 4 containers.

recipes.name: Steak & Veggie Bowl
ingredients: Marinade: 3 tbsp soy sauce, 2 tbsp olive oil, 2 tbsp lime juice, 2 garlic cloves, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp chili powder
instructions: Marinate steak in soy sauce, olive oil, lime juice, garlic, cumin, and chili powder for at least 30 min.
Cook rice per package.
Grill or sear steak over high heat 3-4 min per side for medium. Rest 5-10 min then slice thin against the grain.
Roast or saute broccoli until tender-crisp.
Assemble bowls: rice, broccoli, sliced steak, cherry tomatoes, avocado.
Drizzle extra marinade on top if desired.

recipes.name: Salmon Caesar Wrap
instructions: Mix chopped romaine with light Caesar dressing and Parmesan.
Lay tortillas flat. Add dressed romaine to each.
Place flaked salmon on top. Add croutons.
Squeeze lemon over filling. Add black pepper.
Roll tightly and cut in half.

recipes.name: Protein Chia Pudding
ingredients: 1.5 cups unsweetened almond milk or milk
1/2 cup Greek yogurt stirred in after setting
instructions: Whisk protein powder into milk until fully dissolved.
Add chia seeds, honey, and vanilla. Whisk well.
Let sit 5 min then stir again to prevent clumping.
Cover and refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours.
Before serving stir in Greek yogurt for extra protein and creaminess.
Top with fresh berries.

recipes.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait
ingredients: Optional: 1 scoop vanilla protein powder mixed into yogurt
instructions: If using protein powder mix it into Greek yogurt until smooth.
Spoon half the yogurt into a glass or container.
Add half the granola and half the berries.
Repeat layers with remaining yogurt, granola, and berries.
Drizzle honey on top. Sprinkle chia seeds.
If meal prepping: store granola separately to keep crunchy, assemble when ready to eat.
recipes.storage: Yogurt base fridge 3 days, granola separate

recipes.name: Edamame & Sea Salt
ingredients: Optional: 1/2 tsp garlic powder, chili flakes, or sesame oil drizzle
instructions: Boil a pot of salted water. Add frozen edamame and cook 3-5 min.
Drain and pat dry.
Toss with flaky sea salt and optional seasonings.
Serve warm or chilled.

recipes.name: Hard Boiled Eggs & Hummus Box
ingredients: 8 whole grain crackers or rice cakes
instructions: Hard boil eggs: place in cold water, bring to boil, cook 10-12 min, transfer to ice bath, peel.
Halve eggs and dust with paprika.
Pack into a container with hummus, cucumber, tomatoes, and crackers.
Season as desired.

recipes.name: Tuna Rice Cakes
ingredients: 2 cans (5oz) albacore tuna in water, drained
1 tbsp chopped chives or green onion
Optional: sliced cucumber or avocado on top
instructions: Mix tuna with Greek yogurt, mustard, lemon juice, chives, salt, and pepper.
Spread tuna mixture generously on each rice cake.
Top with cucumber or avocado if desired.
Dust with paprika.
recipes.storage: Tuna mixture fridge 3 days, top rice cakes fresh

recipes.name: Protein Peanut Butter Balls
ingredients: 2 scoops (60g) vanilla or chocolate protein powder
instructions: Mix oats, protein powder, peanut butter, honey, vanilla, and salt in a bowl.
Add chocolate chips and stir.
Add milk one tbsp at a time until dough holds together.
Roll into 18-20 equal balls.
Refrigerate at least 30 min before eating.

recipes.name: String Cheese & Turkey Roll-Ups
instructions: Lay 2 slices of turkey flat on a clean surface.
Place 1 string cheese stick at one end.
Add a pickle spear or cucumber slice alongside the cheese.
Roll turkey tightly around the cheese and pickle.
Secure with a toothpick if needed.
Repeat for remaining roll-ups. Serve with mustard for dipping.

recipes.name: Cottage Cheese Veggie Bowl
ingredients: 1 tbsp fresh chives or green onion
instructions: Spoon cottage cheese into a bowl.
Arrange tomatoes, cucumber, and bell pepper around or on top.
Sprinkle with green onion and everything bagel seasoning.
Drizzle with olive oil. Season with salt and pepper.
recipes.storage: Best eaten fresh, prep components separately for 4 days

recipes.name: Chocolate Protein Shake
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend on high until completely smooth.
Adjust thickness with more milk or ice.
Pour and serve immediately.

recipes.name: Peanut Butter Protein Smoothie
instructions: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until smooth.
Taste and adjust sweetness or thickness as needed.
Drink immediately or store in fridge up to 24 hours with a shake before drinking.

recipes.name: Smoked Salmon & Cucumber Bites
ingredients: 1 tbsp red onion, very finely diced
instructions: Slice cucumber into 1/2 inch rounds and pat dry.
Spread a small amount of cream cheese on each round.
Top with a small piece of smoked salmon.
Garnish with a caper, a sprig of dill, a little red onion, and lemon zest.
Finish with black pepper.

recipes.name: Banana Protein Muffins
ingredients: 1/2 cup rolled oats, blended into flour
Optional: chocolate chips or blueberries to stir in
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F (175C). Line a muffin tin with 12 cups.
Mix mashed banana, eggs, Greek yogurt, honey, and vanilla together.
Add oat flour, protein powder, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt. Mix until combined.
Fold in chocolate chips or blueberries if using.
Fill muffin cups about 3/4 full.
Bake 18-20 min until a toothpick comes out clean.
Cool 10 min before removing.

recipes.name: Cottage Cheese Toast
instructions: Toast bread to preferred doneness.
Spread cottage cheese generously on each slice.
Top with avocado slices.
Add fried or poached eggs on top.
Sprinkle everything bagel seasoning and red pepper flakes.
Add hot sauce if desired.

recipes.name: Shrimp Cocktail
ingredients: 1 lb (450g) large shrimp, peeled and deveined tails on
Cocktail sauce: 1/2 cup ketchup, 1 tbsp prepared horseradish, 1 tsp lemon juice, dash Worcestershire, hot sauce to taste
instructions: Bring salted water to a boil. Add shrimp and cook 2-3 min until pink and curled.
Transfer immediately to an ice bath to stop cooking.
Drain and refrigerate.
Make cocktail sauce by mixing all sauce ingredients.
Arrange chilled shrimp on ice with cocktail sauce and lemon wedges.

recipes.name: Turkey Roll-Ups with Avocado
ingredients: Salt, pepper, and red pepper flakes to taste
instructions: Lay 2 slices of turkey on a flat surface.
Spread a thin layer of hummus on the turkey.
Place a small romaine leaf, 2-3 avocado slices, and shredded carrots at one end.
Squeeze a little lemon juice over the avocado. Season with salt and pepper.
Roll tightly. Secure with a toothpick.
Repeat for all rolls.

recipes.name: High-Protein Breakfast Burrito
ingredients: 1 can (15oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
instructions: Whisk eggs and egg whites with cumin, salt, and pepper.
Spray a skillet, saute pepper and onion 3 min. Add eggs and scramble until cooked.
Warm tortillas.
Layer each with: scrambled eggs, turkey, black beans, cheese, and salsa.
Roll burritos tightly, tucking in sides.
Wrap in foil. Refrigerate or freeze.
recipes.storage: Fridge 4 days / Freezer 2 months (thaw overnight then reheat)

recipes.name: Chicken & Black Bean Quesadilla
ingredients: 2 cups cooked and shredded chicken breast
1 can (15oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
Greek yogurt and extra salsa for serving
instructions: Mix chicken with black beans, corn, cumin, and chili powder.
Lay 2 tortillas flat. Top half of each with chicken mixture and shredded cheese.
Fold tortillas in half.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium. Cook quesadillas 2-3 min per side until golden and cheese melts.
Cut into wedges. Serve with Greek yogurt and salsa.
recipes.storage: Fridge 3 days, reheat in skillet or oven to restore crispness

recipes.name: Ground Turkey Breakfast Hash
ingredients: 3 medium sweet potatoes, peeled and small-diced
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp oil in a large oven-safe skillet over medium-high. Add sweet potatoes, cook 8-10 min until tender.
Add remaining oil, cook onion and pepper 3-4 min. Add garlic 1 min.
Add ground turkey, cook until browned, add spices, stir to combine.
Make 4 wells in the hash and crack an egg into each well.
Transfer to 375F oven (if skillet is not oven-safe, top each egg with a lid and cook on stove over low).
Bake 10-12 min until eggs are set to your liking.
Garnish with chives.
recipes.storage: Fridge 4 days (eggs best cooked fresh each time)

recipes.name: Lemon Herb Chicken Bowl
instructions: Cook quinoa per package instructions.
Marinate chicken in lemon juice, zest, garlic, olive oil, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper for 30 min.
Grill or bake chicken at 400F for 20-22 min until 165F. Rest and slice.
Roast asparagus and cherry tomatoes at 425F for 12-15 min.
Assemble bowls: quinoa, asparagus, roasted tomatoes, sliced chicken.
Garnish with fresh parsley and lemon juice.

recipes.name: Baked Turkey Meatloaf
ingredients: Glaze: 1/4 cup ketchup + 1 tbsp honey + 1 tsp Dijon
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F (190C). Line a loaf pan with parchment.
Mix turkey, breadcrumbs, onion, garlic, eggs, milk, Worcestershire, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Transfer to loaf pan and shape into a loaf.
Mix glaze and spread over top.
Bake 55-65 min until internal temp is 165F.
Rest 10 min before slicing.

recipes.name: Chicken Stir Fry with Cashews
instructions: Cook rice per package instructions.
Mix soy sauce, hoisin, oyster sauce, and sesame oil into a sauce.
Toast cashews in a dry wok 2-3 min until golden. Remove.
Heat oil over high heat. Cook chicken 5-6 min until golden. Remove.
Stir fry broccoli, pepper, and snap peas 3-4 min. Add garlic and ginger 30 sec.
Return chicken to wok. Pour sauce over and toss 1-2 min.
Top with toasted cashews. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Breakfast Egg Muffins with Ham
ingredients: Salt, pepper, and garlic powder to taste
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F (190C). Spray a 12-cup muffin tin.
Whisk eggs and egg whites with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Divide ham, cheese, green onion, and bell pepper evenly into each muffin cup.
Pour egg mixture over fillings, filling cups about 3/4 full.
Bake 20-22 min until puffed and set.
Cool 5 min then remove with a butter knife.

recipes.name: Miso Glazed Cod
ingredients: Sesame seeds and green onions to garnish
Steamed bok choy or broccolini for serving
instructions: Whisk miso, honey, rice vinegar, soy sauce, sesame oil, and garlic into a glaze.
Pat cod dry. Coat each fillet with the miso glaze. Marinate 30 min in the fridge.
Preheat broiler or oven to 425F (220C).
Line a baking sheet with foil. Place glazed cod on top.
Bake or broil 10-14 min until fish flakes and glaze is caramelized.
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions. Serve with steamed greens.

recipes.name: Lentil & Chicken Curry
ingredients: 1.5 lbs (680g) boneless skinless chicken breast, cubed
Fresh cilantro and lemon for serving
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium. Saute onion 5 min, add garlic and ginger 1 min.
Add curry powder, garam masala, and turmeric. Cook 1-2 min.
Add chicken, cook 4-5 min until sealed.
Add lentils, crushed tomatoes, coconut milk, and broth. Stir well.
Bring to boil, reduce heat, cover and simmer 25-30 min until lentils are soft.
Stir in baby spinach until wilted.
Serve with basmati rice. Garnish with cilantro and lemon.

recipes.name: Smoked Salmon Avocado Toast
ingredients: 2 slices thick whole grain sourdough bread, toasted
2 tbsp whipped cream cheese or Greek yogurt
instructions: Toast bread until golden and sturdy.
Mash avocado with a pinch of salt and lemon juice.
Spread cream cheese or Greek yogurt on each slice.
Top with mashed avocado.
Lay smoked salmon over the avocado.
Garnish with capers, red onion, fresh dill, everything bagel seasoning, and black pepper.

recipes.name: Chicken Tomato Soup
ingredients: 1/4 cup light cream or Greek yogurt
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot. Saute onion, celery, and carrots 5-6 min.
Add garlic, Italian seasoning, and basil. Cook 1 min.
Add whole chicken breasts, crushed tomatoes, diced tomatoes, and broth.
Bring to boil, reduce to simmer, cover and cook 25 min.
Remove chicken and shred. Return to pot.
Stir in cream or Greek yogurt. Adjust seasoning.
Garnish with fresh basil.

recipes.name: Protein Waffle
ingredients: 1 cup rolled oats, blended into flour
Toppings: fresh berries, Greek yogurt, maple syrup
instructions: Preheat and spray waffle iron.
Mix oat flour, protein powder, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt.
Whisk yogurt, eggs, milk, and vanilla together.
Combine wet and dry ingredients. Stir until just combined.
Pour batter into waffle iron (amount per manufacturer instructions).
Cook until golden and crisp.
Serve topped with berries, a dollop of Greek yogurt, and a drizzle of maple syrup.
recipes.storage: Fridge 3 days / Freezer 2 months. Reheat in toaster.

recipes.name: Harissa Chicken & Couscous
instructions: Mix harissa, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. Coat chicken and marinate 30 min.
Cook couscous: boil 1.5 cups water, pour over couscous in a bowl, cover and let sit 5 min. Fluff.
Grill or bake chicken at 400F until 165F. Rest and slice.
Roast chickpeas and cherry tomatoes at 400F for 15-20 min until caramelized.
Combine couscous, roasted chickpeas, and cherry tomatoes.
Plate with sliced harissa chicken on top. Garnish with fresh herbs.

recipes.name: Egg White Protein Muffins
ingredients: 1/2 cup rolled oats, blended into flour
Optional: blueberries or chocolate chips to fold in
instructions: Preheat oven to 350F (175C). Spray a 12-cup muffin tin.
Mix mashed banana, egg whites, honey, and vanilla in a bowl.
Add oat flour, protein powder, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt. Stir to combine.
Fold in optional add-ins.
Pour batter into muffin cups about 3/4 full.
Bake 20-22 min until toothpick comes out clean.
Cool before removing.

recipes.name: Lean Beef Burger Bowl
ingredients: 2 cups cooked and cooled fries-style roasted sweet potato
Burger sauce: 2 tbsp Greek yogurt + 1 tbsp ketchup + 1 tsp mustard + 1 tsp pickle juice
instructions: Season ground beef with salt and pepper. Form into 4 equal patties.
Grill or cook in a skillet 3-4 min per side until cooked through.
Break or chop cooked burgers into chunks.
Assemble bowls: romaine, sweet potato fries, burger pieces, tomatoes, onion, cheese, pickles.
Mix burger sauce and drizzle over the top.

recipes.name: Chicken & Veggie Sheet Pan
ingredients: 2 lbs (900g) bone-in chicken thighs or breast
instructions: Preheat oven to 425F (220C). Line a large baking sheet.
Toss all vegetables with 2 tbsp olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Rub chicken with remaining oil, garlic, rosemary, thyme, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Arrange chicken in the center of the baking sheet, vegetables around it.
Place lemon slices on top.
Roast 35-40 min until chicken reaches 165F and vegetables are caramelized.
Serve directly from the pan.

recipes.name: High-Protein Oatmeal
ingredients: 1 tbsp almond butter or peanut butter
1 tbsp chia seeds or flax seeds
instructions: Bring milk to a gentle boil. Add oats and reduce heat.
Stir and cook 4-5 min until oats are creamy and milk is absorbed.
Remove from heat. Stir in protein powder quickly until smooth.
Stir in chia seeds and cinnamon.
Top with sliced banana, peanut butter, and a drizzle of honey.
recipes.storage: Best eaten fresh, can refrigerate 2 days

recipes.name: Shredded Chicken Meal Prep Base
ingredients: 1 tsp Italian seasoning or any seasoning blend
instructions: Place chicken breasts in a large pot or Dutch oven.
Add broth, garlic cloves, and all seasonings.
Cover and bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Cook 18-22 min until chicken is fully cooked through (165F).
Remove chicken and let cool 5 min.
Shred with two forks or use a hand mixer on low speed.
Use in any recipe calling for cooked shredded chicken, or portion as a protein base for bowls all week.

recipes.name: Honey Sriracha Salmon
ingredients: Sesame seeds and green onions to garnish
Steamed rice and vegetables for serving
instructions: Mix honey, sriracha, soy sauce, garlic, and rice vinegar into a glaze.
Pat salmon dry. Brush generously with the glaze.
Heat oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high. Sear salmon 2-3 min per side.
Brush again with glaze. Transfer skillet to 400F oven and bake 5-8 min until cooked to desired doneness.
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.
Serve over rice with steamed broccoli or bok choy.

recipes.name: Canned Tuna & Veggie Stir Fry
ingredients: 2 cans (5oz each) albacore tuna in water, drained
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or skillet over high heat.
Stir fry broccoli, snap peas, and carrots 4-5 min until tender-crisp.
Add garlic and ginger 30 sec.
Add tuna and gently fold in. Pour soy sauce, sesame oil, and sriracha over everything.
Toss gently 1-2 min. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Zucchini & Turkey Egg Scramble
ingredients: Salt, pepper, Italian seasoning to taste
instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high. Cook turkey until browned, season with Italian seasoning.
Add onion, garlic, and zucchini. Cook 3-4 min until softened.
Add cherry tomatoes and cook 1-2 min.
Whisk eggs and egg whites with salt and pepper. Pour over the turkey-veggie mix.
Scramble gently until eggs are cooked through.
Top with shredded cheese and cover 1 min to melt.

recipes.name: Chicken & Broccoli Casserole
ingredients: 4 cups broccoli florets, steamed until just tender
1 can (10.5oz) condensed cream of chicken soup (low sodium)
instructions: Preheat oven to 375F (190C). Spray a 9x13 baking dish.
Mix cream of chicken soup, Greek yogurt, broth, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and pepper.
Combine shredded chicken, broccoli, and cooked rice in the baking dish.
Pour soup mixture over everything and stir to coat.
Top with 3/4 of the shredded cheese.
Cover and bake 25 min. Uncover, add remaining cheese, bake 10 more min until bubbly.

recipes.name: Protein Bar (Homemade No-Bake)
ingredients: 3 scoops (90g) chocolate or vanilla protein powder
3-4 tbsp milk to bind if needed
instructions: Line an 8x8 baking pan with parchment paper.
Mix all ingredients together in a large bowl until a firm dough forms. Add milk one tbsp at a time if too dry.
Press the mixture evenly into the pan.
Refrigerate at least 1 hour until firm.
Cut into 8 bars.
Wrap each bar individually in parchment or foil.

recipes.name: Poached Egg & Avocado Grain Bowl
ingredients: 1 cup cooked farro, quinoa, or brown rice
instructions: Make quick dressing: whisk olive oil, lemon juice, Dijon, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Toss arugula with half the dressing.
Build bowls: dressed arugula, warm grain, cherry tomatoes, and avocado.
Poach eggs: bring water to a gentle simmer, add a splash of vinegar. Crack each egg into a small cup and slide gently into water. Cook 3-4 min until whites are set.
Place 2 poached eggs on each bowl.
Drizzle remaining dressing over everything. Add red pepper flakes.
recipes.storage: Best eaten fresh. Grain and veggies fridge 4 days.

recipes.name: Slow Cooker Chicken & Sweet Potato Stew
ingredients: 2 large sweet potatoes, peeled and cubed
instructions: Add chicken thighs, sweet potatoes, diced tomatoes, chickpeas, onion, and garlic to a slow cooker.
Mix broth with tomato paste, cumin, paprika, turmeric, cinnamon, salt, and pepper. Pour over everything.
Cook on LOW 6-8 hours or HIGH 3-4 hours until chicken is tender.
Remove chicken, shred with two forks, return to slow cooker.
Stir in baby spinach until wilted.
Adjust seasoning. Garnish with fresh parsley.
